content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Arrival of the General". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/144/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of soldiers. The second line contains n space-separated integers representing the heights of the soldiers in a line.
content.outputFormat: Print the index of the shortest soldier (1-indexed) from the right and the index of the shortest soldier (1-indexed) from the left.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Find the minimum height from the left and right, then find the first occurrence of the minimum height from both ends.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
min_val = min(arr)
min_index = arr.index(min_val)
print(min_index + 1)
